nasb.text: The border reached to Tabor and Shahazumah and Beth-shemesh, and their border ended at the Jordan; sixteen cities with their villages.

esv.text: The boundary also touches Tabor, Shahazumah, and Beth-shemesh, and its boundary ends at the Jordan—sixteen cities with their villages.

cnv.text: 又達到他泊、沙哈洗瑪、伯．示麥，直通到約旦河，共十六座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

ccb.text: 他泊、沙哈洗玛、伯·示麦，直到约旦河，共十六座城及其附近的乡村。
